0.1.0.en: New official Go-e App for the Home+, Gemini, CORE and PRO evChargers

1.0.0.en: First release of the new official Go-e App for Homey.

1.0.1.en: Flow card title fix and remove one extra.

1.1.0.en: ADD: Target Power capability for Basic Charging mode.

1.2.0.en: Enhance User card picker UI, now displays the RFID card name. Enhanced power metering with max charging power.

1.3.0.en: Add support for Gemini 2.0 (hardware V5) with the Gemini drivers.

1.4.0.en: Add flexible pricing eco charging. Current price, price limit and action card for price limit. Value is always in local currency as seen by the EV charger. Set your tariff provider in the go-e mobile app.
